\tzpentry{ID4761}{Action Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4761 introduces Action Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\tP(t) = P_0 e^{-(S/V)t} + \\sum \\eta_{\\text{gas}} \\langle \\hat{\\sigma}_{\\text{coll}} \\rangle \\implies P_{\\text{limit}} \\approx 10^{-9} \\text{ Pa}\n\\end{equation}
